title: Lightly Modded Hardcore
description: A vanilla modded hardcore modpack that doesn't change the game too much.
body:
# Lightly Modded Hardcore

This modpack is, as the name suggests, a modded hardcore modpack with a vanilla feel, as it doesn't change the game too much. This modpack is mainly meant for multiplayer as it includes mods to improve the hardcore experience for a world/server with multiple people.

### Adds:
 
- Revive system for multiplayer
- Built in performance mods
- The Essential Mod to play with your friends without a server
- Quality of life mods
- And more!



### Disclaimer!

This modpack is mainly for my own personal use with my friends but I will try to update it when I can.
